---
title: "simapple"
author: "Qiyang Wang"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: pdf_document
---
```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(lubridate)
if (requireNamespace("devtools", quietly = TRUE)) {
  devtools::load_all("..")  
} else {
  library(postshock)
}
```

```{r, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
 local({
  suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(xts))

  set.seed(456)

  gt_n <- 220L
  gt_dates <- seq.Date(from = as.Date("2021-01-01"), by = "day", length.out = gt_n)

  # Random-walk around 100 (same scale as typical ARIMA level forecasts)
  gt_y0 <- cumsum(rnorm(gt_n, 0, 1)) + 100

  # Confounder window (control should remove it)
  gt_t_conf   <- 120L
  gt_len_conf <- 8L
  gt_amp_conf <- +6
  gt_y0[gt_t_conf:(gt_t_conf + gt_len_conf - 1)] <-
    gt_y0[gt_t_conf:(gt_t_conf + gt_len_conf - 1)] + gt_amp_conf

  # Main shock affects t_main+1 (k=1 predicts this point)
  gt_t_main   <- 150L
  gt_amp_main <- +10
  gt_y0[gt_t_main + 1] <- gt_y0[gt_t_main + 1] + gt_amp_main

  gt_Y0 <- xts::xts(gt_y0, order.by = gt_dates)

  # donors: remove confounder effect so they help explain it away
  gt_conf_mask <- seq_len(gt_n) %in% gt_t_conf:(gt_t_conf + gt_len_conf - 1)
  gt_y1 <- (gt_y0 - ifelse(gt_conf_mask, gt_amp_conf, 0)) + rnorm(gt_n, 0, 0.3)
  gt_y2 <- (gt_y0 - ifelse(gt_conf_mask, gt_amp_conf, 0)) + rnorm(gt_n, 0, 1.0)

  gt_Y1 <- xts::xts(gt_y1, order.by = gt_dates)
  gt_Y2 <- xts::xts(gt_y2, order.by = gt_dates)
  gt_Y_series_list <- list(gt_Y0, gt_Y1, gt_Y2)

  # covariates (1 col per series)
  gt_x_base <- cumsum(rnorm(gt_n, 0, 1))
  gt_X0 <- xts::xts(gt_x_base + rnorm(gt_n, 0, 0.2), order.by = gt_dates)
  gt_X1 <- xts::xts(gt_x_base + rnorm(gt_n, 0, 0.2), order.by = gt_dates)
  gt_X2 <- xts::xts(0.4 * gt_x_base + rnorm(gt_n, 0, 1.0), order.by = gt_dates)
  gt_covariates_series_list <- list(gt_X0, gt_X1, gt_X2)

  gt_shock_time_vec   <- c(gt_t_main, gt_t_main, gt_t_main)
  gt_shock_length_vec <- c(1L, 1L, 1L)
  gt_k <- 1L

  # control only on target
  gt_control_shocks <- vector("list", length(gt_Y_series_list))
  gt_control_shocks[[1]] <- list(list(time = gt_t_conf, length = gt_len_conf, shape = "window"))

  gt_truth <- as.numeric(gt_Y0[gt_t_main + 1])
  stopifnot(is.finite(gt_truth))

  take_k1 <- function(v) {
    v <- as.numeric(v)
    stopifnot(length(v) >= 1L, !anyNA(v), all(is.finite(v)))
    v[1]
  }

  gt_res_no <- suppressWarnings(
    SynthPrediction(
      Y_series_list = gt_Y_series_list,
      covariates_series_list = gt_covariates_series_list,
      shock_time_vec = gt_shock_time_vec,
      shock_length_vec = gt_shock_length_vec,
      k = gt_k,
      covariate_indices = 1,
      seasonal = FALSE,
      plots = FALSE,
      use_dbw = TRUE
    )
  )

  gt_res_ctl <- suppressWarnings(
    SynthPrediction(
      Y_series_list = gt_Y_series_list,
      covariates_series_list = gt_covariates_series_list,
      shock_time_vec = gt_shock_time_vec,
      shock_length_vec = gt_shock_length_vec,
      k = gt_k,
      covariate_indices = 1,
      control_shocks = gt_control_shocks,
      seasonal = FALSE,
      plots = FALSE,
      use_dbw = TRUE
    )
  )

  no_unadj  <- take_k1(gt_res_no$predictions$unadjusted)
  no_adj    <- take_k1(gt_res_no$predictions$adjusted)
  ctl_unadj <- take_k1(gt_res_ctl$predictions$unadjusted)
  ctl_adj   <- take_k1(gt_res_ctl$predictions$adjusted)

  err_no_unadj  <- abs(no_unadj  - gt_truth)
  err_no_adj    <- abs(no_adj    - gt_truth)
  err_ctl_unadj <- abs(ctl_unadj - gt_truth)
  err_ctl_adj   <- abs(ctl_adj   - gt_truth)

  cat("\n================= [SynthPrediction] 1-step Ground Truth =================\n")
  cat("t_main =", gt_t_main, "(predicting t_main+1)\n")
  cat("Truth  =", round(gt_truth, 6), "\n\n")
  cat("NO CONTROL:\n")
  cat("  unadjusted =", round(no_unadj, 6),  "| abs err =", round(err_no_unadj, 6), "\n")
  cat("  adjusted   =", round(no_adj, 6),    "| abs err =", round(err_no_adj, 6),   "\n\n")
  cat("WITH CONTROL:\n")
  cat("  unadjusted =", round(ctl_unadj, 6), "| abs err =", round(err_ctl_unadj, 6), "\n")
  cat("  adjusted   =", round(ctl_adj, 6),   "| abs err =", round(err_ctl_adj, 6),   "\n")
  cat("==========================================================================\n\n")

  # soft sanity (not too strict)
  stopifnot(err_ctl_adj <= 5 * err_no_adj + 1e-8)
})

```


```{r}
suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(quantmod)
  library(xts)
})

use_teacher_close <- TRUE

getSymbols(c("AAPL", "^GSPC", "^IRX"), src = "yahoo", from = "2000-01-01")

pick_price <- function(x, use_close = TRUE) {
  if (use_close) return(Cl(x))
  out <- tryCatch(Ad(x), error = function(e) NULL)
  if (is.null(out) || ncol(out) == 0) return(Cl(x))
  out
}

aapl <- pick_price(AAPL, use_close = use_teacher_close)
gspc <- pick_price(GSPC, use_close = use_teacher_close)

irx <- tryCatch(Cl(IRX), error = function(e) NULL)
if (is.null(irx) || ncol(irx) == 0) irx <- IRX[, NCOL(IRX), drop = FALSE]

Z <- Reduce(function(x, y) merge(x, y, join = "inner"), list(aapl, gspc, irx))
Z <- na.omit(Z)
colnames(Z) <- c("AAPL", "GSPC", "IRX")

cat("dim(Z) =", paste(dim(Z), collapse=" x "), "\n")
cat("start/end =", as.character(start(Z)), "->", as.character(end(Z)), "\n")
cat("anyNA(Z) =", anyNA(Z), "\n")

```
```{r}
d0 <- as.Date(c("2017-06-06","2017-06-07","2017-06-08"))
print(Z[d0, c("AAPL","GSPC","IRX")])

dates <- as.Date(index(Z))

find_trading_index <- function(dates, shock_date, rule=c("next","prev","nearest")) {
  rule <- match.arg(rule)
  shock_date <- as.Date(shock_date)
  idx <- which(dates == shock_date)
  if (length(idx) == 1L) return(idx)

  if (rule=="next") return(which(dates > shock_date)[1])
  if (rule=="prev") return(tail(which(dates < shock_date), 1))
  which.min(abs(as.numeric(dates - shock_date)))
}

# 这些是“中间点 / event day”
shock_dates_prof <- as.Date(c("2017-06-06","2018-10-30","2019-06-03"))

# event day index（如果当天是交易日，next 就会返回当天本身）
idx_event <- sapply(shock_dates_prof, \(d) find_trading_index(dates, d, "next"))

# effect day = next trading day（给 k=1 的 effect 用）
idx_effect <- idx_event + 1L
stopifnot(all(idx_effect <= length(dates)))

tab_prof <- data.frame(
  source     = "prof",
  event_date = shock_dates_prof,
  event_day  = dates[idx_event],   # 应该等于输入日期（如果输入本来就是交易日）
  idx_event  = idx_event,
  effect_day = dates[idx_effect],
  idx_effect = idx_effect
)
print(tab_prof)

print_window <- function(Z, idx, w = 2) {
  rng <- (idx - w):(idx + w)
  rng <- rng[rng >= 1 & rng <= nrow(Z)]
  data.frame(
    date = as.Date(index(Z)[rng]),
    AAPL = as.numeric(Z[rng, "AAPL"]),
    GSPC = as.numeric(Z[rng, "GSPC"]),
    IRX  = as.numeric(Z[rng, "IRX"]),
    row.names = NULL
  )
}

# 打印：center = event day（你要的“中间点”）
for (i in seq_len(nrow(tab_prof))) {
  cat("\n============================\n")
  cat("Shock", i, "\n")
  cat("CENTER(event) =", as.character(tab_prof$event_day[i]), "\n")
  cat("Effect(next)  =", as.character(tab_prof$effect_day[i]), "\n")

  wdat <- print_window(Z, tab_prof$idx_event[i], w = 2)
  print(wdat)

  # 严格验证：窗口中心行必须是 event day 且数值匹配
  center_row <- which(wdat$date == tab_prof$event_day[i])
  stopifnot(length(center_row) == 1L)
  stopifnot(abs(wdat$AAPL[center_row] - as.numeric(Z[tab_prof$idx_event[i], "AAPL"])) < 1e-12)

  cat("CENTER MATCH OK (event day)\n")
}

```
 
```{r}
suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(xts)
})

# ============================================================
# Inflation adjustment (convert nominal prices to "2020 dollars")
# - CPI series: CPIAUCSL from FRED (monthly)
# - We compute annual mean CPI, then build a yearly deflator:
#     deflator(year) = CPI_2020 / CPI_year
# - For each trading day in Z, we match its calendar year to the deflator.
# - IMPORTANT: The latest year in CPI may be incomplete and yield NA
#   (e.g., partial-year data), so we DROP years with NA deflator and
#   truncate Z to the last valid CPI year.
# ============================================================

# ----------------------------
# 1) Load CPI monthly series
# ----------------------------
cpi_raw <- read.csv(
  "https://fred.stlouisfed.org/graph/fredgraph.csv?id=CPIAUCSL",
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

# FRED CSV columns are typically: observation_date, CPIAUCSL
stopifnot(all(c("observation_date", "CPIAUCSL") %in% names(cpi_raw)))

# Parse dates and values (ensure numeric)
cpi_raw$observation_date <- as.Date(cpi_raw$observation_date)
cpi_raw$CPIAUCSL <- as.numeric(cpi_raw$CPIAUCSL)

# Build xts (monthly)
cpi_xts <- xts::xts(cpi_raw$CPIAUCSL, order.by = cpi_raw$observation_date)

# ------------------------------------
# 2) Annual mean CPI (one value / year)
# ------------------------------------
# Use na.rm=TRUE to be robust if any month is NA
cpi_y <- apply.yearly(cpi_xts, function(x) mean(x, na.rm = TRUE))

# -----------------------------------------
# 3) Compute yearly deflator to 2020 dollars
# -----------------------------------------
yrs <- as.integer(format(index(cpi_y), "%Y"))

# Pull CPI(2020) safely by year match (not relying on exact year-end date)
cpi_2020 <- as.numeric(cpi_y[yrs == 2020])
stopifnot(length(cpi_2020) == 1L, is.finite(cpi_2020))

# Deflator: multiply nominal price by this to convert to 2020 dollars
infl_y <- cpi_2020 / cpi_y

# Put into a plain data.frame (year -> deflator)
infl_y_df <- data.frame(
  year         = as.integer(format(index(infl_y), "%Y")),
  dollars_2020 = as.numeric(infl_y),
  row.names    = NULL
)

# ---------------------------------------------------------
# 4) Drop invalid deflator years and truncate Z accordingly
# ---------------------------------------------------------
# Some latest-year CPI can be incomplete -> NA deflator (common cause of errors)
infl_y_df_ok <- infl_y_df[is.finite(infl_y_df$dollars_2020), ]

# Last year for which we have a valid deflator
max_cpi_year <- max(infl_y_df_ok$year)

# Truncate Z (xts) to years covered by valid CPI deflators
# NOTE: Z must exist before running this block, and its index must be Date/POSIXct.
dates_Z  <- as.Date(index(Z))
year_Z   <- as.integer(format(dates_Z, "%Y"))
keep_Z   <- year_Z <= max_cpi_year

Z_trim   <- Z[keep_Z]
dates_Z  <- dates_Z[keep_Z]
year_Z   <- year_Z[keep_Z]

# ------------------------------------------------
# 5) Match each trading day to its yearly deflator
# ------------------------------------------------
infl_daily <- infl_y_df_ok$dollars_2020[match(year_Z, infl_y_df_ok$year)]
stopifnot(length(infl_daily) == nrow(Z_trim), !anyNA(infl_daily))

# --------------------------------------
# 6) Apply inflation adjustment to prices
# --------------------------------------
# Only adjust price series; do NOT adjust interest rate series (IRX).
Z_infl <- Z_trim
Z_infl[, c("AAPL", "GSPC")] <- Z_infl[, c("AAPL", "GSPC")] * infl_daily
# Z_infl[, "IRX"] unchanged

# ----------------------------
# 7) Diagnostics / sanity checks
# ----------------------------
cat("CPI annual range:", min(infl_y_df$year), "to", max(infl_y_df$year), "\n")
cat("Valid deflator range:", min(infl_y_df_ok$year), "to", max_cpi_year, "\n")
cat("Z original range:", as.character(start(Z)), "to", as.character(end(Z)), "\n")
cat("Z truncated range:", as.character(start(Z_trim)), "to", as.character(end(Z_trim)), "\n")

# Show last 3 annual CPI means and last 3 deflators
print(tail(cpi_y, 3))
print(tail(infl_y, 3))

# Inspect whether the latest year has NA deflator (typical issue)
print(infl_y_df[infl_y_df$year %in% c(max_cpi_year, max_cpi_year + 1), ])

# List any "bad" years with invalid deflator (should be empty after filtering)
bad_years <- sort(unique(infl_y_df$year[!is.finite(infl_y_df$dollars_2020)]))
print(bad_years)

# Output objects you will use downstream:
# - Z_infl : inflation-adjusted (2020 dollars) time series, aligned and truncated
# - Z_trim : truncated nominal series aligned to CPI coverage (if you need nominal too)

```

```{r}
# shock centers (must be trading days in Z)
shock_dates_prof <- as.Date(c("2017-06-06","2018-10-30","2019-06-03"))

print_window2 <- function(Z, center_date, w = 2) {
  center_date <- as.Date(center_date)
  idx <- which(as.Date(index(Z)) == center_date)
  if (length(idx) != 1L) stop("center_date not found in Z trading days: ", center_date)

  rng <- (idx - w):(idx + w)
  rng <- rng[rng >= 1 & rng <= nrow(Z)]

  out <- data.frame(
    date = as.Date(index(Z)[rng]),
    is_center = as.Date(index(Z)[rng]) == center_date,
    AAPL = as.numeric(Z[rng, "AAPL"]),
    GSPC = as.numeric(Z[rng, "GSPC"]),
    IRX  = as.numeric(Z[rng, "IRX"]),
    row.names = NULL
  )
  out
}

for (d in shock_dates_prof) {
  cat("\n============================\n")
  cat("CENTER =", as.character(d), "\n")

  cat("\n--- Nominal (Z) ---\n")
  print(print_window2(Z, d, w = 2))

  cat("\n--- Inflation-adjusted (Z_infl) ---\n")
  print(print_window2(Z_infl, d, w = 2))
}

```

```{r}
# shock date (event date)
shock_date <- as.Date("2020-11-10")

# trading dates
dates <- as.Date(index(Z))

# 找到 shock 当天对应的交易日 index
idx_shock <- which(dates == shock_date)
stopifnot(length(idx_shock) == 1L)

# target = shock 后一天的 AAPL 价格
target_date  <- dates[idx_shock + 1]
target_price <- as.numeric(Z[idx_shock + 1, "AAPL"])

window <- (idx_shock - 1):(idx_shock + 2)

data.frame(
  date = dates[window],
  AAPL = as.numeric(Z[window, "AAPL"]),
  row.names = NULL
)


```


```{r}
# ---- paper-style choices ----
pre_tgt  <- 20L
post_tgt <-  2L

pre_don  <- 12L
post_don <- 12L

k  <- 2L
Ls <- 1L

target_shock_day <- as.Date("2020-11-10")

# donor 的真实 shock day（不要动）
donor_shock_days_true <- as.Date(c("2017-06-06","2018-10-30","2019-06-03"))

slice_around <- function(Z, shock_day, pre, post){
  dates <- as.Date(index(Z))
  idx <- which(dates == as.Date(shock_day))
  stopifnot(length(idx) == 1L)
  Z[(idx-pre):(idx+post), ]
}

# ---- 1) target window ----
Z_tgt <- slice_around(Z_infl, target_shock_day, pre = pre_tgt, post = post_tgt)
shock_time_tgt_local <- pre_tgt + 1L

# ---- 2) donor windows（以真实 shock day 切窗，不要用 shock-5） ----
Z_don_list <- lapply(donor_shock_days_true, \(d) slice_around(Z_infl, d, pre = pre_don, post = post_don))
shock_time_don_local <- pre_don + 1L

# ---- 3) assemble inputs ----
Y_series_list <- c(
  list(Z_tgt[, "AAPL", drop = FALSE]),
  lapply(Z_don_list, \(zz) zz[, "AAPL", drop = FALSE])
)

X_for_dbw <- c(
  list(Z_tgt[, c("GSPC","IRX"), drop = FALSE]),
  lapply(Z_don_list, \(zz) zz[, c("GSPC","IRX"), drop = FALSE])
)

# ---- 4) shock time vectors (local indices) ----
shock_time_vec   <- c(shock_time_tgt_local, rep(shock_time_don_local, length(Z_don_list)))
shock_length_vec <- rep(Ls, length(Y_series_list))

# ---- 5) control shocks (target only) ----
other_shock_days <- as.Date("2020-10-10")

dates_tgt <- as.Date(index(Z_tgt))
idx_other_local <- sapply(other_shock_days, \(d){
  ii <- which(dates_tgt == d)
  if (length(ii) == 0L) NA_integer_ else ii
})
idx_other_local <- idx_other_local[is.finite(idx_other_local)]
idx_other_local <- idx_other_local[idx_other_local <= shock_time_tgt_local]

control_shocks <- if (length(idx_other_local) == 0L) {
  NULL
} else {
  lapply(idx_other_local, \(t0) list(time = as.integer(t0), length = 1L, shape = "point"))
}

# ---- run ----
out <- SynthPrediction(
  Y_series_list = Y_series_list,
  covariates_series_list = X_for_dbw,
  shock_time_vec = shock_time_vec,
  shock_length_vec = shock_length_vec,
  k = k,
  use_dbw = TRUE,
  dbw_indices = 1:2,
  covariate_indices = NULL,
  arima_order = NULL,
  seasonal = FALSE,
  control_shocks = control_shocks,
  dbw_center = TRUE,
  dbw_scale  = TRUE,
  days_before_shocktime_vec = 10L,

  plots = TRUE
)


out$meta$weights
out$meta$omega_vec
out$predictions
```

```{r}
suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(xts)
  library(forecast)
})

# ---- inputs ----
shock_day <- as.Date("2020-11-10")
pre <- 200L   
dates <- as.Date(index(Z_infl))
idx <- which(dates == shock_day)
stopifnot(length(idx) == 1L)

 
a <- idx - pre
b <- idx
stopifnot(a >= 1)

win <- Z_infl[a:b, c("AAPL","GSPC","IRX"), drop = FALSE]

# ---- build ARX(1) training data: y_t ~ y_{t-1} + x_{t-1} ----
y  <- as.numeric(win$AAPL)
x  <- as.matrix(win[, c("GSPC","IRX")])

# lag-1 (xreg at t-1)
y_lag <- y[-length(y)]
y_cur <- y[-1]

x_lag <- x[-NROW(x), , drop = FALSE]   # aligns with y_cur

# ---- fit ARX(1): ARIMA(1,0,0) with xreg = lagged covariates ----
fit <- forecast::Arima(
  y_cur,
  order = c(1,0,0),
  xreg  = x_lag,
  method = "ML",          # 避免 CSS 那个 non-stationary 报错
  transform.pars = FALSE  # 更稳
)

# ---- 1-step forecast: need next xreg (use last available lagged covariates) ----
x_next <- matrix(x[NROW(x), ], nrow = 1)   # x_{T} 作为 forecast 时刻的 xreg（因为我们用的是 lag-1）
colnames(x_next) <- colnames(x_lag)

fc <- forecast::forecast(fit, h = 1, xreg = x_next)
yhat_arx <- as.numeric(fc$mean)

# ---- ground truth (shock 后一天) ----
y_true <- as.numeric(Z_infl[idx + 1, "AAPL"])

cat("\n=== Pure ARX(1) unadjusted baseline ===\n")
cat("shock day:", as.character(shock_day), "\n")
cat("predict day:", as.character(dates[idx+1]), "\n")
cat("yhat_arx =", yhat_arx, "\n")
cat("y_true   =", y_true, "\n")
cat("abs err  =", abs(yhat_arx - y_true), "\n")


suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(quantmod)
  library(xts)
})

# ============================================================
# Teacher-style UNADJUSTED baseline (Apple case)
# - Local 25 trading-day window ending at T* (= 2020-11-09)
# - ARX(1) implemented as linear regression:
#     y_t = b0 + b1*y_{t-1} + b2*GSPC_t + b3*IRX_t + b4*shock_dummy_t + e_t
# - Unadjusted forecast = 2-step recursion to y_{T*+2} (2020-11-11)
# - Shock dummy is set to 0 in forecasting (unadjusted).
# - IMPORTANT: This is NOT your package; it's a clean baseline to compare against.
# ============================================================

# ---- assumes you already have Z_infl (xts) with cols: AAPL, GSPC, IRX ----
stopifnot(exists("Z_infl"))
stopifnot(all(c("AAPL","GSPC","IRX") %in% colnames(Z_infl)))

# ---- teacher's reference T* and evaluation at T*+2 ----
Tstar_day <- as.Date("2020-11-09")   # T1*
h         <- 2L                      # forecast to T*+2
window_n  <- 25L                     # local window length used in the paper code

dates <- as.Date(index(Z_infl))
idx_T <- which(dates == Tstar_day)
stopifnot(length(idx_T) == 1L)

# need enough history and horizon
stopifnot(idx_T - (window_n - 1) >= 2L)     # need lag
stopifnot(idx_T + h <= NROW(Z_infl))        # need future truth and covariates

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# 1) Build TS1 window: 25 days ending at T*
# ------------------------------------------------------------
win_idx <- (idx_T - (window_n - 1)) : idx_T
TS1 <- Z_infl[win_idx, c("AAPL","GSPC","IRX")]

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# 2) Create lagged response regression dataset
#    y_t uses covariates at time t, and lagged AAPL at t-1
# ------------------------------------------------------------
# y_t (current)
y  <- as.numeric(TS1$AAPL)

# y_{t-1} (lag)
y_lag <- c(NA, y[-length(y)])

# covariates at time t
gspc <- as.numeric(TS1$GSPC)
irx  <- as.numeric(TS1$IRX)

# shock dummy in their TS1 code: they used 2020-10-09 as "obs.shock"
# (keep it exactly as teacher code; doesn't affect unadjusted forecast when set to 0)
obs_shock_day <- as.Date("2020-10-09")
shock_dummy <- as.numeric(as.Date(index(TS1)) == obs_shock_day)

# assemble data frame, drop first row due to lag NA
dat <- data.frame(
  y = y,
  y_lag = y_lag,
  gspc = gspc,
  irx  = irx,
  shock = shock_dummy
)
dat_fit <- dat[-1, , drop = FALSE]

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# 3) Fit ARX(1) via lm (teacher-style)
# ------------------------------------------------------------
fit <- lm(y ~ y_lag + gspc + irx + shock, data = dat_fit)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# 4) 2-step recursive UNADJUSTED forecast to T*+2
#    Need covariates for t=T*+1 and t=T*+2 (use realized X like teacher)
# ------------------------------------------------------------
X_next <- Z_infl[(idx_T + 1):(idx_T + h), c("GSPC","IRX")]
gspc_next <- as.numeric(X_next$GSPC)
irx_next  <- as.numeric(X_next$IRX)

b <- coef(fit)

# step 1: forecast y_{T*+1}
y_T <- as.numeric(Z_infl[idx_T, "AAPL"])
yhat_1 <- as.numeric(b["(Intercept)"] +
                       b["y_lag"] * y_T +
                       b["gspc"]  * gspc_next[1] +
                       b["irx"]   * irx_next[1] +
                       b["shock"] * 0)

# step 2: forecast y_{T*+2} using yhat_1 as lag
yhat_2 <- as.numeric(b["(Intercept)"] +
                       b["y_lag"] * yhat_1 +
                       b["gspc"]  * gspc_next[2] +
                       b["irx"]   * irx_next[2] +
                       b["shock"] * 0)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# 5) Ground truth and print
# ------------------------------------------------------------
y_true <- as.numeric(Z_infl[idx_T + h, "AAPL"])

cat("\n=== Teacher-style UNADJUSTED (ARX(1) via lm) ===\n")
cat("T* day         :", as.character(Tstar_day), "\n")
cat("Predict day    :", as.character(dates[idx_T + h]), " (T*+2)\n")
cat("Window length  :", window_n, "trading days (ending at T*)\n")
cat("yhat(T*+1)     :", sprintf("%.6f", yhat_1), "\n")
cat("yhat(T*+2)     :", sprintf("%.6f", yhat_2), "\n")
cat("y_true(T*+2)   :", sprintf("%.6f", y_true), "\n")
cat("abs err (T*+2) :", sprintf("%.6f", abs(yhat_2 - y_true)), "\n")

# Optional: inspect coefficients
cat("\n--- lm coefficients ---\n")
print(coef(summary(fit)))


```
